---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? Which use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like the feature to work. Include any relevant graph schema changes,
API routes, or UI components.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about.

## Additional Context

Links to specifications (EHDS, HealthDCAT-AP, FHIR R4, OMOP CDM, Eclipse EDC), mockups,
or related issues.
